title: Ticket 08 - Availability & documentation
description: Dummy data for ticket 08 - Availability & documentation (V01) in the DoomScrollQuiz.

questions.prompt: In ticket 08 the key statement appears: "Classify and apply availability and documentation in the training company safely in daily work." What did he say?

options.text: We should clearly understand availability and documentation in the training company and implement them cleanly in daily work.
options.explanation: This summarizes the core idea of availability and documentation in the training company in a direct, practical way.

options.text: We can ignore availability and documentation in the training company as long as there is no time pressure.
options.explanation: Availability and documentation in the training company should not be postponed or ignored.

options.text: Only the team lead is allowed to deal with availability and documentation in the training company.
options.explanation: This makes the topic unnecessarily exclusive and misses the learning idea.

options.text: Availability and documentation in the training company only become relevant after the project ends.
options.explanation: The learning idea should be applied during ongoing daily work.

questions.prompt: Which reaction best fits ticket 08 regarding availability and documentation in the training company?

options.text: Align briefly, document cleanly, and make the next step clear.
options.explanation: This combines clarification, transparency, and actionable implementation.

options.text: Write nothing down at first and decide later by feel.
options.explanation: For availability and documentation in the training company this would be imprecise and risky.

options.text: Only raise problems once they are fully escalated.
options.explanation: The right direction is to clarify early instead of escalating late.

options.text: Avoid questions even if the goal is still unclear.
options.explanation: The learning idea requires clarity, not silent guessing.
